settings.title: Original language used when presenting The Shoe Museum Logo in 2001 — Shoe Label
settings.content:
• Referencing the materials and common vernacular of shoes.
  • A nod the beauty of shoemaking and craftsmanship.
  • Logo and graphic language borrow from the standard utilitarian labels and iconography used on sneakers.
  • Simple clean typography and graphics lend modern but approachable sensibility to the brand.
  • Classic, timeless, depth, feel, quality, integrity

settings.title: Website Design & Development
settings.content: • In 2025, The Shoe Museum started working on the website design and development.

settings.title: Website Launch
settings.content: • In 2026, The Shoe Museum launched its website to showcase its collection of shoes and the stories behind them.
